task_completion.description: Navigate to the 'Projects' workspace in Nuxeo
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Nuxeo Web UI shows the 'Projects' workspace is open, typically indicated by the breadcrumb or navigation menu.
The document details or preview page for 'Annual Report 2023' is displayed on the screen.

task_completion.description: Access the tagging input field or dialog
task_completion.visual_evidence: A tag input field, dropdown, or 'Add tag' dialog is actively open or focused on the document page.
The word 'finance' is typed into the tag input field before submission.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'finance' tag is applied to the document
task_completion.visual_evidence: The tag 'finance' is visibly attached to the 'Annual Report 2023' document, usually appearing as a chip, badge, or label in the document's metadata or tags section.

integrity.description: The agent used the Nuxeo Web UI to complete the task
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a web browser displaying the Nuxeo interface, not terminal windows running curl commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Nuxeo application
integrity.visual_evidence: The Nuxeo interface appears fully rendered with standard elements (menus, document previews, sidebars) rather than a mocked HTML page or text editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a database client to insert the tag directly
integrity.visual_evidence: No PostgreSQL client (like psql or pgAdmin) or terminal database sessions are visible in the screenshots.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task is performed in Nuxeo Platform 10.10 using the nuxeo-web-ui package. The target document is 'Annual Report 2023' located in the 'Projects' workspace (path: /default-domain/workspaces/Projects/Annual-Report-2023). The agent must successfully apply the tag 'finance' to this document. Look for the 'finance' tag chip/badge on the document's detail page in the Web UI.
